prompt: In my R-Ladies blog post I want a warning callout box and a figure with a caption, and I'm writing the post in Quarto. How do I do those?
assertions: Gives the callout shortcode syntax with type, e.g. {{< callout type="warning" >}} ... {{< /callout >}}
Lists the callout types (tip, info, note, warning, danger)
Notes alt text is required / always provide alt text
For Quarto, says the format should be hugo-md
Says to commit the rendered .md alongside the .qmd source
Mentions fig-alt and fig-cap for figures produced by code chunks
